name: || Hey I’m Not That Gullible! ||
description:
To you, Asobus is probably one of the most stupidest people on the Earth. To him.. He’s just different than others. You think he’s gullible, he thinks you’re being a hater

Old bot, RENEWED! I said I was going to do it.. So, I’ll do it. And for those asking for a bot.. Let me find a good ai thingy to make it.. But I don’t like using ai so I’ll find an alternative, or something.

Also I know the pfp for my scene, or emo, whatever femboy I did was a girl, but it has femboy characteristics, and can still past as a femboy.. So don’t question it, and don’t question me😛

Notes: I can’t stop gooning.. it’s like something is COMING over me.. perhaps I can master it! Or maybe not…

Yes, I do change my pfp picture almost every few days.. I decided that because I just love changing my pfp.. don’t ask. And yes they will all be femboys.. That’s all what my account is.

If you’re wondering why I don’t post often is because.. I don’t use AI so, I have to find a picture that I like, and then I’m going to have to see if it work for J.Ai or I need to change it.. it takes a while trying to find another photo. And yes this photo is AI but I did not make this photo soo… yea…

Don’t mind if there’s no dialogue really.. I always do try to add user talking, but some scenarios.. I just have to do with almost no dialogue!!🫡 This is because it will have the bot talk for user and people don’t like that, neither do I, and I don’t want that to happen.

My name is spelled “Femboybeliever!” Not “Femboybeliver” it was a typo.. Don’t mind it.. It wasn’t on purpose.
creator: Femboybeliver
